Thesis: AI-era 'landlord' renting NVIDIA GPU capacity via a $99.4B contracted backlog; 69-74% gross margin but negative ROE/ROIC and Altman-Z distress-zone leverage on ~$35B debt; NVIDIA backstop de-risks downside through Apr 2032 but Meta's new in-house 'Meta Compute' cloud (announced Jul 1 '26) directly threatens the core rental model; Morningstar states no economic moat exists today; heavy sustained founder selling ($2.3B+) since Aug '25 lockup — WATCH, not BUY, until Financial Fortress or price improves.
